member.name: T:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException
member.summary: Base exception for all Synap SDK errors.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.HttpError(System.String,System.Int32)
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.ServerError(System.String)
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.NetworkError(System.String)
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.InvalidResponse(System.String)
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.SynapException.InvalidConfig(System.String)
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.UnsupportedCommandException
member.summary:
Raised when a command has no native mapping for the active transport.
Native transports (SynapRPC, RESP3) can only execute commands that are mapped to wire commands in .

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.UnsupportedCommandException.Command
member.summary: Gets the SDK command name that was rejected.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.UnsupportedCommandException.Transport
member.summary: Gets the transport mode string that rejected the command.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.UnsupportedCommandException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a default instance (required by CA1032).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.UnsupportedCommandException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes with a message (required by CA1032).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Exceptions.UnsupportedCommandException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes with a message and inner exception (required by CA1032).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.SetBitAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Set bit at offset to value (SETBIT).
member.returns: Previous bit value (0 or 1)

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.GetBitAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: Bit value (0 or 1)

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.BitCountAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: Number of set bits

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.BitPosAsync(System.String,System.Byte,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find first bit set to value (BITPOS).
member.param: Bit value to search for (0 or 1)
member.returns: Position of first matching bit, or null if not found

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.BitOpAsync(Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.BitmapOperation,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Perform bitwise operation on multiple bitmaps (BITOP).
member.param: Source bitmap keys (NOT requires exactly 1 source)
member.returns: Length of resulting bitmap in bits

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.BitFieldAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Synap.SDK.Modules.BitfieldOperation},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: List of result values (one per operation)

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapManager.StatsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: Bitmap statistics

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Modules.BitmapStats.TotalBits
member.summary: Total number of bits across all bitmaps.

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.Modules.Location
member.summary: Location with latitude, longitude, and member.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.GeospatialManager.GeoRadiusByMemberAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Double,Synap.SDK.Modules.DistanceUnit,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query members within radius of given member (GEORADIUSBYMEMBER).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HashManager.GetAllAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all fields and values from hash.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HashManager.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if field exists in hash.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HashManager.KeysAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all field names in hash.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HashManager.LenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get number of fields in hash.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HashManager.SetNXAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Set field only if it doesn't exist.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HyperLogLogManager.PfAddAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add elements to a HyperLogLog structure (PFADD).
member.param: Elements to add (strings or byte arrays)
member.returns: Number of elements added (approximate)

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HyperLogLogManager.PfCountAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Estimate cardinality of a HyperLogLog structure (PFCOUNT).
member.returns: Estimated cardinality (approximate count)

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HyperLogLogManager.PfMergeAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: Estimated cardinality of merged result

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.HyperLogLogManager.StatsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: HyperLogLog statistics

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Modules.HyperLogLogStats.TotalCardinality
member.summary: Total estimated cardinality across all HyperLogLog structures.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: The value as a JSON element, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.GetAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a strongly-typed value by key.
member.returns: The deserialized value, or default if not found.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: True if the key exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.IncrAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: The new value after incrementing.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.DecrAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: The new value after decrementing.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.StatsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: Statistics as a dictionary.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.KVStore.ScanAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Maximum number of keys to return.
member.returns: List of matching keys.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.ListManager.LPushAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Push elements to left (head) of list.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.ListManager.RPushAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Push elements to right (tail) of list.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.ListManager.LPopAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pop elements from left (head) of list.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.ListManager.RPopAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pop elements from right (tail) of list.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.ListManager.RangeAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get range of elements from list.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.PubSubManager.PublishAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a message to a topic.
member.returns: Number of subscribers that received the message.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.PubSubManager.SubscribeTopicsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a subscription on the server (HTTP transport only). For real-time delivery on SynapRPC, use .

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.PubSubManager.ObserveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe and yield push messages as an async stream (SynapRPC only).
On a SynapRPC transport this opens a dedicated server-push TCP connection and yields messages in real time. On other transports this registers the subscription via HTTP and returns an empty stream (no real-time delivery).
member.param: Token used to stop the stream.
member.returns: Async stream of message dictionaries (keys: topic, payload, id, timestamp).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.QueueManager.PublishAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a message to a queue.
member.returns: The message ID.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.QueueManager.ConsumeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Consumes a message from a queue.
member.returns: The queue message, or null if no message is available.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.QueueManager.NackAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Negative acknowledges a message (requeues it for retry).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.SetManager.IsMemberAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if member exists in set.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.SetManager.MoveAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Move member from source to destination set.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.SetManager.DiffAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get difference of sets (first minus others).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.StreamManager.PublishAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes an event to a stream room.
member.returns: The event offset in the stream.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.TransactionManager.#ctor(Synap.SDK.SynapClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.TransactionManager.MultiAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Optional client identifier to group commands within the same transaction.
member.returns: Transaction response with success status and message.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.TransactionManager.DiscardAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Optional client identifier for the transaction.
member.returns: Transaction response with success status and message.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.TransactionManager.WatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Collection of keys to watch for changes.
Optional client identifier for the transaction.
member.returns: Transaction response with success status and message.
member.exception: Thrown when keys collection is empty.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.TransactionManager.UnwatchAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Optional client identifier for the transaction.
member.returns: Transaction response with success status and message.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Modules.TransactionManager.ExecAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Optional client identifier for the transaction.
member.returns: Transaction execution result. If successful, returns results array. If aborted (due to watched keys changed), returns aborted status.

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.SynapClient
member.summary: Main Synap SDK client for interacting with the Synap server.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.#ctor(Synap.SDK.SynapConfig)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.#ctor(Synap.SDK.SynapConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Optional custom HTTP client. When provided, native transports are disabled so that tests can inject a mocked HttpClient without opening TCP connections.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.Hash
member.summary: Gets the Hash data structure operations.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.List
member.summary: Gets the List data structure operations.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.Set
member.summary: Gets the Set data structure operations.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a Synap operation, routing through native transport when available. Falls back to HTTP for operations that are not mapped to native commands (e.g. queues, streams, pub/sub).
member.param: The target resource (key name, queue name, etc.).
member.returns: The response as a JSON document.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.SendCommandAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Sends a command with a pre-assembled payload dictionary (preferred over ExecuteAsync).
Mapped commands are routed through native transport (SynapRPC or RESP3). Unmapped commands raise on native transports.
member.returns: The response as a JSON document.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.GetSynapRpcTransport
member.summary: Returns the active if the client was configured with a SynapRPC transport, or null otherwise.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapClient.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the client and releases resources.

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig
member.summary:
Configuration for the Synap client.
Preferred constructor usage — URL schemes:
new SynapConfig("http://localhost:15500") // HTTP transport new SynapConfig("synap://localhost:15501") // SynapRPC transport new SynapConfig("resp3://localhost:6379") // RESP3 transport

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets the base URL of the Synap server (used for HTTP transport).

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.Timeout
member.summary: Gets the request timeout in seconds.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.AuthToken
member.summary: Gets the authentication token (API key) for requests.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.Username
member.summary: Gets the username for Basic Auth.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.Password
member.summary: Gets the password for Basic Auth.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.MaxRetries
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of retries for failed requests.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.RpcHost
member.summary: Gets the host for SynapRPC transport.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.RpcPort
member.summary: Gets the port for SynapRPC transport.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.Resp3Host
member.summary: Gets the host for RESP3 transport.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.Resp3Port
member.summary: Gets the port for RESP3 transport.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of from a URL.
URL schemes:
http:// or https:// — HTTP transport
synap://host:port — SynapRPC transport
resp3://host:port — RESP3 transport
member.param: The URL (with scheme) or bare HTTP base URL.
member.exception: Thrown when the URL is null or empty.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new configuration with the specified URL.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithTimeout(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with the specified timeout.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithAuthToken(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with the specified auth token.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithBasicAuth(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with Basic Auth credentials.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithMaxRetries(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with the specified maximum retries.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithHttpTransport
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration using HTTP transport.
member.remarks: Deprecated: pass an http:// URL to the constructor instead.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithSynapRpcTransport
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration using SynapRPC transport.
member.remarks: Deprecated: pass a synap:// URL to the constructor instead.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithResp3Transport
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration using RESP3 transport.
member.remarks: Deprecated: pass a resp3:// URL to the constructor instead.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithRpcAddr(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with the specified SynapRPC address.
member.remarks: Deprecated: pass a synap://host:port URL to the constructor instead.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapConfig.WithResp3Addr(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with the specified RESP3 address.
member.remarks: Deprecated: pass a resp3://host:port URL to the constructor instead.

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.TransportMode
member.summary: Transport mode for the Synap client.

member.name: F:Synap.SDK.TransportMode.SynapRpc
member.summary: SynapRPC native protocol over TCP with MessagePack (default, port 15501).

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.WireValue.ToWire(System.Object)
member.summary: Wraps a plain value into externally-tagged WireValue for SynapRPC.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.WireValue.FromWire(System.Object)
member.summary: Unwraps an externally-tagged WireValue decoded from MessagePack.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.CommandMapper.MapCommand(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Maps a Synap operation + payload to a native command + args. Returns null for operations that must fall back to HTTP.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.CommandMapper.MapResponse(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Maps the raw native response back to the Synap response shape.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapRpcTransport.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.Object[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a command over SynapRPC and returns the plain (unwrapped) result.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.SynapRpcTransport.SubscribePushAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Opens a dedicated server-push TCP connection, sends a SUBSCRIBE frame, and yields push messages as an async stream.
Push frames from the server use id == 0xFFFFFFFF (U32_MAX) as a sentinel. The stream completes when the cancellation token is cancelled or the connection is closed by the server.
member.param: Token used to stop the stream.
member.returns: An async stream of push-message dictionaries.

member.name: M:Synap.SDK.Resp3Transport.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.Object[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a RESP3 command and returns the decoded result.

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.Types.QueueMessage
member.summary: Represents a message from a queue.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Types.QueueMessage.Priority
member.summary: Gets the message priority (0-9, higher is more important).

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Types.QueueMessage.Retries
member.summary: Gets the number of times this message has been retried.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Types.QueueMessage.MaxRetries
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of retries allowed.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Types.QueueMessage.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the message timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).

member.name: T:Synap.SDK.Types.StreamEvent
member.summary: Represents an event from a stream.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Types.StreamEvent.Offset
member.summary: Gets the event offset in the stream.

member.name: P:Synap.SDK.Types.StreamEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the event timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
